mods.name: Shinra Meter (Classic+)
mods.author: TERA-Europe-Classic, based on Gothos/neowutran/michaelcarno/LukasTD lineage
mods.short_description: Real-time combat tracker and performance overlay for TERA Classic+.
mods.long_description:
Shinra Meter provides a live overlay showing your damage, healing, and buffs while you play. It helps you track your performance and improve your gameplay with detailed encounter logs.

Features:
- Live combat overlay for you and your party
- Detailed breakdowns of damage, healing, and buffs
- Encounter history and performance tracking
- Customizable in-game display

This version is pre-configured to work seamlessly with the Classic+ launcher.
mods.credits: Originally created by Gothos and maintained by the ShinraMeter community. This Classic+ version is updated and maintained by TERA Europe Classic.
mods.tagline: Tera DPS Meter for the Evervyn and EU Classic Private Servers

mods.name: TCC (Classic+)
mods.author: TERA-Europe-Classic, based on Foglio1024/Tera-custom-cooldowns
mods.short_description: Customizable combat UI with cooldown tracking and boss gauges.
mods.long_description:
TCC (Tera Custom Cooldowns) enhances your game interface with helpful combat windows, including skill cooldowns, party status, and boss health bars.

This Classic+ version is optimized for performance and focuses on the most essential features for players. You can easily customize your experience by turning individual windows on or off in the settings.

Key features include the cooldown tracker, group window, and boss gauge.
mods.credits: Originally created by Foglio1024 and the TCC community. This Classic+ version is maintained by TERA Europe Classic with a focus on essential game features.

mods.name: Elin Matching Ears & Tails
mods.author: Yupi
mods.short_description: Gives Elins ears and tails that match each hairstyle's color.
mods.long_description:
Replaces the Elin ear and tail textures so they match the color of every hairstyle, instead of the default mismatched look.

Covers all Elin hairstyles (278 texture variants). Install, enable, and launch the game — no manual file copying needed.

Original mod by Yupi. Rehosted unmodified for the Classic+ launcher.
mods.credits: Created by Yupi (https://yupimods.tumblr.com/). Rehosted unmodified for the TERA Europe Classic+ launcher — no edits were made to the author's files. If you are the author and would prefer this entry removed or reattributed, open an issue on TERA-Europe-Classic/external-mod-catalog.
mods.tagline: Elin ears & tails recolored to match every hairstyle

mods.name: Clean Onscreen Messages
mods.author: SaltyMonkey
mods.short_description: Removes center-screen message spam: lockon, 'affects you', skill reset, item obtained/enchanted.
mods.long_description:
SaltyMonkey's clean onscreen-messages mod (native 64-bit, patch-98 UI codebase):

- Removed lockon messages
- Removed "locking you" message (heal only; debuff kept)
- Removed "X affects you" message spam
- Removed "Skill reset" message spam
- Removed "X obtained" / "X enchanted" message spam
- Slight transparency for the block icon and reworked block message text

Rehosted unmodified for the Classic+ launcher.
mods.credits: Created by SaltyMonkey (https://github.com/SaltyMonkey/tera-online-clean-onscreen-messages). Rehosted unmodified — all credit to the original author. If you are the author and would prefer this entry removed or reattributed, open an issue on TERA-Europe-Classic/external-mod-catalog.

mods.name: Thinkblob Mount
mods.author: Foglio1024 (original thinkblob mod), x64 port by Lukas
mods.short_description: Thrall Lord mount + summon icon with foglio's thinking blob face. Patches the streamed texture cache and swaps the skill icon; fully reversible.

mods.name: Green Crosshair
mods.author: JustCrazy
mods.short_description: Replaces the hard-to-see orange stock crosshair with a green one.
mods.long_description:
Swaps the stock orange action-camera crosshair for a clearly visible green one.

Created by JustCrazy (NovaTera Discord, Dec 2025): “I was having a hard time seeing the orange in the stock crosshair so here is a green one.”
mods.credits: Created by JustCrazy (NovaTera modding Discord). Rehosted unmodified for the TERA Europe Classic+ launcher — no edits were made to the author's files. If you are the author and would prefer this entry removed or reattributed, open an issue on TERA-Europe-Classic/external-mod-catalog.
mods.tagline: A crosshair you can actually see
